gap benefit phase. See GAP_INP_1M_COINS_TIER_01 - GAP_INP_1M_COINS_TIER_09. 

During 2008–2010 there were only seven tiers (i.e., variables GAP_INP_1M_COINS_TIER_08 and 
GAP_INP_1M_COINS_TIER_09 were not applicable). For 2011 and later, there were only six tiers (i.e., 
variable called GAP_INP_1M_COINS_TIER_07 was not applicable after 2010). 

The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit.
